meta.title: Martin Lehocky - Developer Portfolio
meta.description: Portfolio of Martin Lehocky, an iOS and web developer open to internship opportunities.

hero.name: Martin Lehocky
hero.description: I build practical products across mobile and web, with a strong focus on reliability, clean UX, and team collaboration.
hero.internship: Currently looking for internship and junior opportunities where I can contribute and grow with experienced teams.

about.title: Building products with curiosity and discipline
about.description: I am a digital technology student at SPSE Halova in Bratislava, focused on application development and enterprise-oriented thinking. I enjoy translating ideas into useful, well-structured software.

education.title: Education
education.content:
SPSE Halova, Bratislava
Digital Technology Programming
Second Year

location.title: Location
location.content:
Bratislava, Slovakia
Open to remote collaboration

skills.title: Technology and collaboration toolkit
skills.description: My core stack combines mobile and web development with backend, infrastructure, and strong team-oriented execution.

projects.title: Selected work
projects.description: A few projects that represent my product thinking, technical range, and execution quality.

plannie.title: Plannie
plannie.description: A full-stack event planning platform with Go backend and Next.js frontend, including authentication, data management, and deployment-ready architecture.

healthie.title: Healthie
healthie.description: An iOS app focused on daily planning and health tracking, designed and developed end-to-end with practical everyday use in mind.

testprep.title: Test Preparation Web App
testprep.description: An interactive education app helping students prepare for national tests through structured practice and clear progress feedback.

homeserver.title: Home Server Infrastructure
homeserver.description: Hands-on infrastructure learning with Linux environments, storage technologies, and practical server administration workflows.

events.title: Hackathons and community events
events.description: I regularly join and help organize events where teams build fast, learn quickly, and share ideas.

contact.title: Open to internship opportunities
contact.description: I am actively looking for internship and junior roles where I can deliver value, learn from senior engineers, and contribute to real products.

footer.builtWith: Built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and next-intl.
